title: Create Unpack logo favicon to replace Vite default
description: Replace the default Vite favicon with a custom Unpack logo icon. Should work as a favicon (16x16, 32x32) and be recognizable at small sizes. SVG format for scalability.
acceptance_criteria: Custom SVG favicon replaces vite.svg in public/ and index.html
Icon is recognizable at 16x16 favicon size
Matches Unpack brand (gold accent #E6A329, dark background #111111)
